# AcademiQR

> AcademiQR is a link-sharing platform for academics and conference presenters. Create themed link collections with QR codes to share research papers, datasets, and resources at conferences and lectures.

## Features
- Create themed link collections for conferences and presentations
- Generate customizable QR codes with logo overlay
- Share via short URLs (academiqr.com/u/username/collection)
- Track page views and link click analytics
- Reusable link library across collections
- Passkey-protected collections for controlled access
- Dark/light mode support
- Data export (JSON, Excel, CSV)

## Links
- Homepage: https://academiqr.com
- Privacy Policy: https://academiqr.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://academiqr.com/terms.html
